cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Professional and Personal Collapse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Frank Galvin falls from ethically compromised practitioner to publicly discredited and emotionally broken lawyer, culminating in the physical rejection of his professional identity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: engages in ambulance chasing with transactional relationships
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: fully disengaged from legal work, discarding files and degrees
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: no clear path forward, only numb repetition

cross_scene_arcs.title: Recommitment to Justice and Case Preparation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Galvin shifts from passive observer to committed advocate, rejecting a settlement to pursue justice and actively building a legal strategy with renewed focus.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: documenting evidence and observing the victim's condition
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: actively preparing for trial with renewed focus and direction
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how he will successfully litigate the case with limited experience and financial means

cross_scene_arcs.title: Ethical Boundary Testing in Investigation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Galvin employs intrusive and deceptive tactics to locate and identify witnesses, crossing ethical lines in pursuit of evidence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: begins active investigation by physically intruding into a witness's private affairs
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: successfully acquires identifying information through subterfuge
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: moral justification for breaking rules to pursue justice

cross_scene_arcs.title: Trial Setback and Recovery of Hope
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After a devastating courtroom loss when key evidence is disallowed, Galvin regains cautious hope as jury deliberations suggest a possible favorable outcome.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: suffers major setback in trial, case collapses in real time
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: moves from defeated resignation to tentative optimism
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: what the final verdict will be

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional and Moral Rebirth
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Galvin rejects corrupting financial compromise and a return to his past personal life, choosing instead solidarity with his ally and a path of integrity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: rejects easy resolution despite financial desperation
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: chooses solidarity with Mickey and moves forward, emotionally separating from his past

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Involvement with Galvin
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Laura transitions from initial flirtation with Galvin to physical and emotional intimacy, assumes a supportive and then challenging role in his crisis, but ultimately faces rejection and the collapse of their relationship after a violent confrontation and unreciprocated attempt at reconciliation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: hesitant engagement with Galvin at a bar, maintaining emotional distance post-divorce
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: relationship ends silently and definitively as Galvin walks away from her reconciliation attempt
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Laura's emotional outcome remains uncertain; she is left without closure after Galvin's rejection

cross_scene_arcs.title: Laura's Return to Legal Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Laura re-enters the legal profession through Concannon, receives a confidential firm document, contemplates a future beyond the trial, and prepares to finalize her divorce—marking a reclamation of professional identity amid personal transition.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: returning to law practice after personal upheaval, welcomed back by Concannon
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: actively preparing to sign divorce papers and re-engage with legal work, in possession of a confidential report
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: personal cost of returning to a high-pressure legal career remains unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict Over the Joseph Galvin Report
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Laura's possession of a confidential report on Joseph Galvin triggers a chain of events culminating in Galvin's violent confrontation with her and the collapse of their relationship, with the source and purpose of the report remaining unexplained.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Laura possesses a confidential dossier on Joseph Galvin, discovered by Mickey
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Galvin confronts Laura violently, implying he knows about the report, but its origins and authorization remain unknown
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Why Laura has the report and who authorized the investigation into Joseph Galvin

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shifting Role in Galvin's Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Laura evolves from a listener of Galvin's moral aspirations to a caretaker during his stress, then shifts to a challenger confronting his self-sabotage, before being emotionally sidelined as his focus returns to the case, marking her diminishing influence on his personal trajectory.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: gaining insight into Galvin's desire to do something right in the case
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: leaves Galvin's office after being brushed off, emotionally disengaged and dismissed
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Galvin's ability to cope under pressure and whether he can accept help from others

cross_scene_arcs.title: Partnership Fractured and Rekindled
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Mickey severs ties with Galvin due to his self-destructive behavior, then gradually re-engages as Galvin renews his commitment to a difficult case, moving from resistance to reluctant support through shared courtroom experience.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mickey ends professional partnership with Galvin over alcoholism and neglect
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mickey stands by Galvin after trial, sharing a moment of silent solidarity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether their partnership will continue beyond the trial

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Pragmatism vs. Idealism
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Mickey repeatedly opposes Galvin's decision to pursue justice against powerful institutions, advocating for settlement and survival, but remains involved despite disagreeing with the moral direction of the case.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mickey urges Galvin to accept a settlement and avoid trial
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mickey stays with the case even after it appears lost, though unconvinced of its value
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether Mickey ultimately believes in the cause or remains out of loyalty

cross_scene_arcs.title: Guardian of Galvin's Downfall and Recovery
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Mickey positions himself as the voice who foresaw Galvin's past collapse and now monitors his relapse and recovery, reacting with frustration when Galvin falters but staying engaged to influence his choices.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mickey recounts Galvin's past breakdown with a tone of warning
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mickey silently judges Galvin's courtroom mistake, showing continued emotional investment
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether Mickey can prevent Galvin from self-sabotage in the long term

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mickey's Silent Knowledge of Laura's Role
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Mickey transitions from being a messenger to a direct participant in Galvin's life, then discovers Laura's secret investigation into Joseph Galvin but chooses to conceal his knowledge.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Mickey meets Laura at the bar, initiating personal contact
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mickey possesses incriminating information about Laura but remains silent
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether Mickey will reveal what he knows or use it later
